name: Creamy Baked Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 14 oz can Sweetened Condensed Milk (not evaporated milk)
1 8 oz pkg sour cream at room temperature
1 21 oz jar Cherry Pie Filling, cold
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees.
2. Combine the crumb crumbs, sugar, and margarine; press firmly on the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese until fluffy.
4. Gradually add the sweetened condensed milk until smooth.
5. Add eggs and lemon juice; mix well.
6. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 50-55 minutes or until the center is set; top with sour cream.
8. Continue baking for an additional 5 minutes.
9. Cool, chill, and top with cherry pie filling. Refrigerate leftovers.
